title: Croatian Crusted Crumble Bread
description: A delicious twist on traditional crumble toppings, using Croatian ingredients to add a unique flavor to your homemade bread.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine flour, crumbly topping, and crumble mixture.
Add herb and mix until well combined.
Slice the bread into 1-inch thick slices.
Dip each bread slice into the crumb mixture, coating evenly.
Place coated bread slices on a baking sheet.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
Sprinkle crunchy topping on top of the bread.
